name: Track 1 — GitHub Pages publishing
objective: Publish the docs/ track as a GitHub Pages static site: GitHub Actions workflow building with mkdocs-material pinned to 9.7.6 (matching the local Docker image) and deploying via the official Pages actions, site_url updated to https://leetusik.github.io/knowledge/, auto-nav (no nav:, no strict:) preserved, publishing stays manual git push only — agents never push.

review.note: All slices re-validated together (pinned local build, guards, pin parity, live-site 200s, state); intent satisfied clause-by-clause; Doc impact consolidated into decisions/v0003 + operations/v0003
